name: Software Architecture
description: Guidance for quality-focused software development based on Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design principles, covering early return patterns, library-first approach, DDD/ubiquitous language, naming conventions, separation of concerns, and anti-pattern avoidance

findings_summary.notes: Prompt-only skill (SKILL.md only, no scripts or hooks). Provides concise, opinionated coding standards based on Clean Architecture and DDD: early returns, arrow functions, max 80-line functions, max 200-line files, domain-specific naming, no generic utils/helpers, library-first approach, and separation of concerns. No executable code or network calls. Zero attack surface. Part of NeoLabHQ/context-engineering-kit (532 stars, TypeScript primary language, active repo, GPL-3.0). The ddd plugin directory also includes a setup-code-formating skill (separate skill). Skill content is well-structured and actionable.

scan_summary: SKILL.md only - no scripts, hooks, or executables. Concise software architecture guidelines. No security concerns.
